inputTitle: Compare two lists before you sync or clean them up
inputDescription: Paste two item sets, then inspect overlap, one-sided entries, and duplicates without leaving the browser.
listAPlaceholder: Paste source A, subscriber list, SKU set, or IDs…
listBPlaceholder: Paste source B, destination list, audit set, or IDs…
optionsDescription: Control how input is split and normalized before the comparison runs.
summaryDescription: Use the counts below to understand how much will match, drop out, or need deduping.
resultsDescription: Switch between each set, then copy or download exactly the slice you need.
emptyStateTitle: Paste at least one list to start comparing
emptyStateDescription: The comparer will build shared, one-sided, unique, and duplicate result sets from your input.
noItemsLabel: No rows in this result set.
